2605.25931.title: Explore Before You Solve: The Speed--Depth Trade-off in Epistemic Agents for ARC-AGI-3
2605.25931.paper_summary: We systematically investigate all 25 public ARC-AGI-3 games and find that every one is reachable through non-intelligent strategies: 10 in a single blind step, 5 after one probing action, 1 via repeated ACTION1 presses, 1 via diverse exploration, and 8 via single repeated actions with sufficient budget (50-200 steps). A library-level null-coordinate vulnerability additionally bypasses 18 games in 1 step. This benchmark critique implies the public evaluation set cannot discriminate intelligent exploration from trivial heuristics - the private 55-game evaluation is the only genuine intelligence test. Against this backdrop, we present AERA (Adaptive Epistemic Reasoning Agent), a three-phase (EXPLORE / VERIFY / PLAN) agent achieving RHAE=0.2116 (4/25 solved) on these 25 games with Qwen2.5-0.5B, while random and no-explore baselines score 0.0000. We formalise AERA through a Speed--Depth trade-off framework: under a convexity assumption (proved for a class of environments in the Appendix), RHAE's quadratic form emerges as a second-order penalty for deviating from the Pareto frontier between action efficiency and information gain. Contributions: (i) a benchmark validity analysis showing that current interactive reasoning benchmarks fail to measure the exploration they claim to require, and (ii) the EXPLORE-before-PLAN framework and model-capability x exploration interaction. The linked code track entry achieves RHAE=0.30 on the full 55-game private evaluation. Code: CC0.
2605.25931.paper_summary_zh: 我們系統性地調查了所有25個公共ARC-AGI-3遊戲，發現每一個都可以通過非智能策略達成：10個在一次盲步中，5個在一次探測行動後，1個通過重複按下ACTION1，1個通過多樣化探索，還有8個通過在足夠預算（50-200步）的情況下進行單一重複行動。一個庫級的零坐標漏洞額外使18個遊戲在1步內被繞過。這一基準批評意味著公共評估集無法區分智能探索和微不足道的啟發式方法——私人55個遊戲的評估才是真正的智能測試。在這樣的背景下，我們提出了AERA（自適應認知推理代理），這是一個三階段（探索/驗證/計劃）代理，在這25個遊戲上使用Qwen2.5-0.5B達到了RHAE=0.2116（4/25解決），而隨機和不探索的基準得分為0.0000。我們通過速度-深度權衡框架形式化AERA：在一個凸性假設下（在附錄中對一類環境進行了證明），RHAE的二次形式出現為偏離行動效率和信息增益之間帕累托邊界的二階懲罰。貢獻：（i）基準有效性分析顯示當前的互動推理基準無法衡量它們聲稱需要的探索，以及（ii）探索優先於計劃的框架和模型能力與探索的互動。鏈接的代碼追蹤條目在完整的55個遊戲私人評估中達到了RHAE=0.30。代碼：CC0。
2605.25931.author: Liew Keong Han et.al.
